title: Maitrakh
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
[[File:Leia_Maitrakh2.jpg|thumb|right|200px|The [[Unidentified maitrakh|''maitrakh'']] of [[clan Kihm'bar]] meets [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]].]]

'''''Maitrakh''''' was the title given to a [[Noghri/Legends|Noghri]] clan leader which was usually the eldest [[Gender/Legends|female]]. A [[Unidentified maitrakh|''maitrakh'']] from the [[Kihm'bar]] [[Clan Kihm'bar|clan]] helped [[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]] by using her [[Mission to Honoghr|influence]] to convince the Noghri to [[Noghri revolution|end]] their alliance with the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire]].

{{Stub}}
